query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS snap_device_ipaddr (
    id              BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    raw_id          BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    device_id       INT         NOT NULL,
    ipaddr          VARCHAR(45) NOT NULL,
    last_observation_time BIGINT DEFAULT NULL,
    is_current      BOOLEAN     NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
    polled_at       DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    KEY idx_sdi_device (device_id),
    KEY idx_sdi_ipaddr (ipaddr),
    KEY fk_sdi_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_sdi_device FOREIGN KEY (device_id) REFERENCES dim_device(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_sdi_raw    FOREIGN KEY (raw_id)    REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS snap_device_dnsname (
    id              BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    raw_id          BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    device_id       INT         NOT NULL,
    dns_name        VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    is_current      BOOLEAN     NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
    polled_at       DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    KEY idx_sdd_device (device_id),
    KEY fk_sdd_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_sdd_device FOREIGN KEY (device_id) REFERENCES dim_device(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_sdd_raw    FOREIGN KEY (raw_id)    REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS snap_device_software (
    id              BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    raw_id          BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    device_id       INT         NOT NULL,
    software_json   JSON        NOT NULL,
    is_current      BOOLEAN     NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
    polled_at       DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    KEY idx_sds_device (device_id),
    KEY fk_sds_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_sds_device FOREIGN KEY (device_id) REFERENCES dim_device(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_sds_raw    FOREIGN KEY (raw_id)    REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
